questionHtml: Based on the information, suggest with a reason which of the labelled cell types will become more common in Allium root tips treated with ZDV.
markschemeHtml:
a. Y (will become more common) ✔

b. spindle not formed yet
OR
cells x and z have spindles ✔

c. cells in Y cannot progress (into Z/into metaphase) ✔

meta.title: Based on the information, suggest with a reason which of the labelled cell types will become more common in Allium root tips treated with ZDV.
